turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Uh hello. Aapka clinic government employees ke liye CGHS empanelled hai kya?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Haan ji, hum CGHS empanelled hain. Central government employees aur unke dependents cashless services le sakte hain.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Aur CGHS card se OPD bhi cover hoga ya sirf IPD?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: CGHS ke through OPD consultations bhi cover hote hain empanelled hospitals mein. Aapko apna CGHS card aur beneficiary ID card laana hoga.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Specialist ke liye referral chahiye kya?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: CGHS ke norms ke anusaar, specialist ke liye CGHS dispensary se referral recommended hai. Please apne dispensary se confirm kar lein pehle — har case alag ho sakta hai.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Koi bhi aur sawaal ho toh call karein. Aapka swagat hai.
